pr.title: WIP: Depth Recurrence — val_bpb 3.2134 (beats baseline by 0.014 BPB at 2.8x fewer params)

output.summary: Weight-shared depth recurrence with learned iteration conditioning reuses few unique transformer blocks to reach >20 effective layers under 16MB.
techniques: Weight-shared recurrence with iteration embeddings and sigmoid gating
Partial depth recurrence to simulate deeper networks within strict budgets
Compatible GPTQ int6 quantization across repeated layers
